title: Terratec
description: A Vanilla+ pack with a stunning new world generation!
body:
![Terratec - Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/beaaef9b550d06df1c18649b5e69f553b1635e49.png)

# Description
**Terratec** is a Minecraft modpack designed for players who love **exploration**, **survival**, and a **Vanilla Plus** experience. Built around the stunning new world generation from the **Terralith** and **Tectonic** mods, Terratec offers a beautifully enhanced and more realistic world with new biomes, underground rivers, and massive mountain ranges.

The modpack is perfect for all types of players, especially those who enjoy the vanilla experience but want a bit **more beauty and variety** in their world. With a range of decorative mods and quality of life improvements, players can enjoy **building**, **trading**, and **exploring** at their own pace.

Key features include a **minimap**, **chunk claiming**, enhanced world generation, and frequent updates. Running on Minecraft 1.21 (Fabric), Terratec offers a flexible difficulty—making it accessible to both casual players and seasoned adventurers.

Whether you are playing solo or with friends in multiplayer, Terratec provides the **perfect blend of vanilla charm and exciting new terrain to explore**.
